testcase.name: SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > imsmanifest.xml structure > generates manifest with correct XML namespace
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > imsmanifest.xml structure > includes required schema locations
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > imsmanifest.xml structure > sets manifest identifier attribute
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > imsmanifest.xml structure > sets manifest version attribute
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > imsmanifest.xml structure > generates organizations element with default attribute
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > imsmanifest.xml structure > generates organization with unique identifier and title
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > imsmanifest.xml structure > generates item referencing the sco resource
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > imsmanifest.xml structure > generates resources element
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > imsmanifest.xml structure > generates resource with webcontent type
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > imsmanifest.xml structure > includes adlcp:masteryscore when passingScore is set
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > imsmanifest.xml structure > does not include masteryscore when not provided
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > imsmanifest.xml structure > sets href to the entry point SCO
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > imsmanifest.xml structure > files element includes all published assets
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > SCORM 1.2 XSD Validation > generated manifest is valid against SCORM 1.2 CAM XSD
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > SCORM 1.2 XSD Validation > reports errors for malformed XML
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > SCORM 1.2 XSD Validation > reports errors for missing required elements
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > SCORM 1.2 XSD Validation > reports errors for invalid namespace
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > SCORM 1.2 API Wrapper > api.js is included in the SCORM 1.2 package
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > SCORM 1.2 API Wrapper > LMSInitialize returns true on success
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > SCORM 1.2 API Wrapper > LMSSetValue sets cmi.core.lesson_status correctly
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > SCORM 1.2 API Wrapper > LMSGetValue retrieves previously set value
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > SCORM 1.2 API Wrapper > LMSCommit is called on slide exit
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > SCORM 1.2 API Wrapper > Handles LMS not found gracefully (offline mode)
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > SCORM 1.2 API Wrapper > suspend_data is serialized as base64 (max 4096 bytes)
SCORM 1.2 Manifest Generation > SCORM 1.2 API Wrapper > Completion status: incomplete/completed/passed/failed set correctly
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Valid .pathfinder → Project object > parses a minimal valid .pathfinder ZIP
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Valid .pathfinder → Project object > extracts metadata (id, title, author, timestamps)
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Valid .pathfinder → Project object > extracts slides array with at least one slide
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Valid .pathfinder → Project object > extracts variables object
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Valid .pathfinder → Project object > extracts navigation with entrySlide and slides array
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Valid .pathfinder → Project object > extracts schemaVersion and formatVersion for migration tracking
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Invalid JSON → descriptive error > throws when project.json contains invalid JSON
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Invalid JSON → descriptive error > error code is JSON_PARSE_ERROR
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Invalid JSON → descriptive error > error message includes the filename
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Invalid JSON → descriptive error > error message does not leak raw JSON content
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Missing required file → error with filename > throws when project.json is missing from ZIP
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Missing required file → error with filename > error code is MISSING_FILE
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Missing required file → error with filename > error message names the missing file
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Missing required file → error with filename > throws when manifest.json is missing from ZIP
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Missing required file → error with filename > throws when content/ directory is missing
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Media reference with no file → warning > records a warning for each media reference with no matching file
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Media reference with no file → warning > warning includes the media path that is missing
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Version mismatch → warning > warns when schemaVersion is newer than supported
Pipeline Stage 1: Parse > Version mismatch → warning > warns (does not reject) when formatVersion is slightly older
Project Structure (ZIP container) > Valid .pathfinder ZIP opens successfully > opens a valid .pathfinder ZIP without error
Project Structure (ZIP container) > project.json exists at root > rejects ZIP without project.json at root
Project Structure (ZIP container) > project.json exists at root > rejects ZIP with project.json in subdirectory
Project Structure (ZIP container) > manifest.json exists at root > rejects ZIP without manifest.json at root
Project Structure (ZIP container) > content/ directory exists (even if empty) > rejects ZIP without content/ directory
Project Structure (ZIP container) > Media files in content/ have valid extensions > accepts media files with valid extensions
Project Structure (ZIP container) > Media files in content/ have valid extensions > warns on files with unrecognized extension in content/
Project Structure (ZIP container) > Media files in content/ have valid extensions > rejects executables (exe, app, dmg) in content/
Project Structure (ZIP container) > No hidden files (.DS_Store, Thumbs.db) > warns about .DS_Store files in archive
Project Structure (ZIP container) > No hidden files (.DS_Store, Thumbs.db) > warns about Thumbs.db files in archive
Project Schema > 1.1 JSON Schema Validation > accepts a valid .pathfinder project file
Project Schema > 1.1 JSON Schema Validation > rejects when $schema is missing
Project Schema > 1.1 JSON Schema Validation > rejects when schemaVersion is invalid format
Project Schema > 1.1 JSON Schema Validation > rejects when formatVersion is invalid
Project Schema > 1.1 JSON Schema Validation > rejects when required field metadata.id is missing
Project Schema > 1.1 JSON Schema Validation > rejects unknown top-level fields
Project Schema > 1.1 JSON Schema Validation > warns on unknown event type (forward-compat)
Project Schema > 1.2 Project Structure > accepts a valid .pathfinder project structure
Project Schema > 1.2 Project Structure > rejects slides array with fewer than 1 item
Project Schema > 1.2 Project Structure > accepts empty variables object
Project Schema > 1.3 Slide Data > parses a slide with id, type, sceneId, and duration
Project Schema > 1.3 Slide Data > parses a slide with solid background
Project Schema > 1.3 Slide Data > parses a slide with gradient background
Project Schema > 1.3 Slide Data > parses a slide with image background referencing media
Project Schema > 1.3 Slide Data > parses a layer with objects
Project Schema > 1.3 Slide Data > parses an object with position and size
Project Schema > 1.3 Slide Data > parses an object with font properties
Project Schema > 1.4 Trigger Data > parses a trigger with event + action
Project Schema > 1.4 Trigger Data > parses a trigger with conditions
Project Schema > 1.4 Trigger Data > parses a trigger with disabled: true
Project Schema > 1.4 Trigger Data > parses a trigger with nested AND/OR condition groups
Project Schema > 1.4 Trigger Data > warns on broken object reference in trigger source
Project Schema > 1.4 Trigger Data > parses all 35 known event types
Project Schema > 1.4 Trigger Data > parses all 40 known action types
Project Schema > 1.5 Variable Data > parses a variable with name, type, and initialValue
Project Schema > 1.5 Variable Data > parses variable with scope (project/scene/slide)
Project Schema > 1.5 Variable Data > parses system variable reference
Project Schema > 1.5 Variable Data > rejects invalid variable type
Project Schema > 1.5 Variable Data > parses all 8 variable types
Project Schema > Version Fields > accepts valid schemaVersion format (semver)
Project Schema > Version Fields > rejects invalid schemaVersion
Slide Schema > Background types > accepts solid background
Slide Schema > Background types > accepts gradient background
Slide Schema > Background types > accepts image background
Slide Schema > Background types > accepts video background
Slide Schema > Background types > rejects invalid background type
Slide Schema > All object types > accepts "text" object type
Slide Schema > All object types > accepts "button" object type
Slide Schema > All object types > accepts "shape" object type
Slide Schema > All object types > accepts "image" object type
Slide Schema > All object types > accepts "video" object type
Slide Schema > All object types > accepts "audio" object type
Slide Schema > All object types > accepts "hotspot" object type
Slide Schema > All object types > accepts "drag-drop" object type
Slide Schema > All object types > accepts "slider" object type
Slide Schema > All object types > accepts "text-entry" object type
Slide Schema > All object types > accepts "result" object type
Slide Schema > All object types > accepts "character" object type
Slide Schema > Layers > parses a feedback layer
Slide Schema > Slides with triggers > parses a trigger on the slide itself
Slide Schema > Slides with triggers > parses multiple triggers
Slide Schema > Audio > parses audio with id, src, volume and loop
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "userClick"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "timelineStarts"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "timelineEnds"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "mediaEnds"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "mediaStarts"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "variableChanges"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "questionSubmitted"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "sliderMoves"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "dragDropComplete"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "courseStarts"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "courseEnds"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "resultsCalculated"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "mouseEnter"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "mouseExit"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "focus"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "blur"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "keyPress"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "timelinePaused"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "timelineResumed"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "mediaPaused"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "mediaSeeking"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "attemptStarted"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "attemptSubmitted"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "attemptReviewed"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "formSubmitted"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "scrollIntoView"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "animationComplete"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "audioEnds"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "videoEnds"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "quizPassed"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "quizFailed"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "surveyCompleted"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "linkClicked"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "buttonPressed"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "dropdownChanged"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "checkboxChanged"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "radioChanged"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "timerExpired"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "visitedSlides"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event type "visitedObjects"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > warns on completely unknown event type (forward-compat)
Trigger Schema > Trigger Events > parses event with optional source field
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "jumpToSlide"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "showLayer"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "hideLayer"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "setVariable"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "adjustVariable"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "playMedia"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "pauseMedia"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "startTimeline"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "pauseTimeline"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "submitQuiz"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "exitCourse"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "fireXAPIStatement"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "conditional"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "delay"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "stopMedia"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "seekMedia"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "showObject"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "hideObject"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "enableObject"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "disableObject"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "toggleObject"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "animateObject"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "setFocus"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "scrollToObject"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "showTooltip"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "playAnimation"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "stopAnimation"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "sendEmail"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "openURL"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "showModal"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "closeModal"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "showFeedback"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "hideFeedback"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "incrementCounter"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "decrementCounter"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "resetVariable"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "resetQuiz"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "resetSlide"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "goBack"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "goForward"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "showNavigation"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "hideNavigation"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "lockNavigation"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "unlockNavigation"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "setSlideBackground"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "loadScene"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "executeJavaScript"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "waitForInteraction"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "showCaption"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > parses action type "hideCaption"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Actions > warns on unknown action type (forward-compat)
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses condition type "variableEquals"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses condition type "variableNotEquals"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses condition type "variableGreaterThan"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses condition type "variableLessThan"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses condition type "variableContains"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses condition type "variableIsEmpty"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses condition type "mediaPlayed"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses condition type "slideVisited"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses condition type "attemptCount"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses condition type "scoreRange"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses condition type "and"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses condition type "or"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses condition type "not"
Trigger Schema > Trigger Conditions > parses conditional action with branches
Trigger Schema > Required fields > rejects a trigger missing id
Trigger Schema > Required fields > rejects a trigger missing event
Trigger Schema > Required fields > rejects a trigger missing action
Trigger Schema > Optional fields > accepts optional description field
Trigger Schema > Optional fields > accepts optional priority field
Trigger Schema > Optional fields > accepts disabled trigger
Variable Schema > 8 Variable Types > parses type "trueFalse"
Variable Schema > 8 Variable Types > parses type "boolean"
Variable Schema > 8 Variable Types > parses type "number"
Variable Schema > 8 Variable Types > parses type "text"
Variable Schema > 8 Variable Types > parses type "slider"
Variable Schema > 8 Variable Types > parses type "sequence"
Variable Schema > 8 Variable Types > parses type "date"
Variable Schema > 8 Variable Types > parses type "math"
Variable Schema > 8 Variable Types > rejects unknown variable type
Variable Schema > 4 Scope Levels > parses scope "course"
Variable Schema > 4 Scope Levels > parses scope "scene"
Variable Schema > 4 Scope Levels > parses scope "quiz"
Variable Schema > 4 Scope Levels > parses scope "slide"
Variable Schema > 4 Scope Levels > defaults scope to "course" when omitted
Variable Schema > Variable Fields > parses variable with numeric min/max
Variable Schema > Variable Fields > parses text variable with maxLength
Variable Schema > Variable Fields > parses text variable with validValues enum
Variable Schema > Variable Fields > parses variable with LMS mapping
Variable Schema > Variable Fields > parses course-scoped variable with persistAcrossSessions
Variable Schema > Variable Fields > parses variable with description and tags
Variable Schema > Variable Fields > rejects invalid LMS standard
Variable Schema > Required fields > rejects variable missing type
Variable Schema > Required fields > rejects variable missing defaultValue
